description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:latest Docker image and defines a before_script that runs python -V, installs virtualenv via pip, creates a virtual environment in a venv directory, and activates it. Set a PIP_CACHE_DIR variable pointing to .cache/pip, and cache both the .cache/pip directory and the venv/ folder. Add a run job (default stage) that executes python setup.py bdist_wheel, then pip install dist/*, and publishes any dist/*.whl files as artifacts. Add a test job (default stage) that runs python setup.py test. Both jobs inherit the before_script and the cache settings.
